name: job-page-draft-assistant
description: A Chrome extension that helps you create tailored resumes and cover letters directly from any job posting page.

scripts.test:unit: node tests/extraction.test.js && node tests/profileProposalApply.test.js && node tests/jobChatProfileProposal.test.js && node tests/profileRoundTrip.test.js && node tests/autofillMatcher.test.js && node tests/pdfImport.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
